intended_use: The EdgeFlow UH10 is an ultrasound device intended to be used for measuring the urine volume in the bladder noninvasively. It is intended for use in professional healthcare facilities, such as hospita
intended_use_full: The EdgeFlow UH10 is an ultrasound device intended to be used for measuring the urine volume in the bladder noninvasively. It is intended for use in professional healthcare facilities, such as hospitals, clinics, by qualified and trained healthcare professionals. The EdgeFlow UH10 supports B-mode and harmonic imaging modes.
target_condition: Measurement of urinary bladder volume and residual urine volume
ground_truth: Test dataset independently reviewed by two evaluators with clinical experience; review results transformed into ground truths to assess network performance
other_metrics: Classification Network - F1 score: 0.979 (95% CI 0.974–0.984); Segmentation Network - Dice Score: 0.896 (95% CI 0.890–0.901); Primary endpoint for classification: F1 score ≥0.90; Secondary endpoint for classification: PR AUC ≥0.95; Primary endpoint for segmentation: Dice Score ≥0.89. Measurement Accuracy: 0-100mL = ±7.5mL; 100-999 mL = ±7.5%.
